zh.lifeSummary: 當Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil於1165年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆蒙艾利馬時，他的父親Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil36歲，母親Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois28歲。他於大約1180年與Rixende de Poitiers Valentinois結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1232年5月在他的家鄉享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil于1165年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆蒙艾利馬时，他的父亲Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil36岁，母亲Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois28岁。他于大约1180年与Rixende de Poitiers Valentinois结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1232年5月在他的家乡享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Monteil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German or French   Montel  .

Swedish: ornamental name, probably from Latin mons, genitive montis ‘mountain, hill’ as a translation of the Swedish word or placename element berg (see Berg ) + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

variants.name: Montel
meanings: German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with munt ‘protection, guardianship’.
French: topographic name from Occitan montel ‘little mountain’, or a habitational name from Le Montel, the name of several places in Auvergne and Forez.

nameMeanings.name: Géraud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil was born in 1165, in Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil, was 36 and his mother, Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, was 28. He married Rixende de Poitiers Valentinois about 1180. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in May 1232, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil est né en 1165, à Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Rixende de Poitiers Valentinois environ 1180. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en mai 1232, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil 1165 in Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil 36 und seine Mutter Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois 28. Er hat um 1180 Rixende de Poitiers Valentinois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im Mai 1232 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil è nato il nel 1165 nel Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Rixende de Poitiers Valentinois circa 1180. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel maggio 1232, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Géraud II Adhémar de Monteilが1165年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスドルoメモントeリマーで生まれた時，父Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteilは36歳，母Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinoisは28歳であった。約1180年にRixende de Poitiers Valentinoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1232年5月に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil(이)가 1165년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 드o 몽e리마에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1180년 Rixende de Poitiers Valentinois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1232년 5월 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil nasceu em 1165, em Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Rixende de Poitiers Valentinois aproximadamente 1180. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em maio de 1232, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil родился в 1165 г. в местности монтeлимар, дрoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Rixende de Poitiers Valentinois около 1180 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер май 1232 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Géraud II Adhémar de Monteil nació en 1165, en Montélimar, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Géraud Ier Adhémar de Monteil, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ermenssinde de Poitiers-Valentinois, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Rixende de Poitiers Valentinois aproximadamente 1180. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en mayo de 1232, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
